title: tithymalus oschtenicus
side_effects: Tithymalus oschtenicus can have side effects if used improperly, such as gastrointestinal problems, nausea, and diarrhea, especially when ingested in large quantities. In rare cases, excessive consumption may also lead to headaches, dizziness, and allergic reactions, including skin irritation and inflammation. Improper use of the plant may also interact with certain medications, such as blood thinners and diabetes medications, resulting in adverse effects. It is essential to consult a medical professional before using Tithymalus oschtenicus for medicinal purposes to avoid potential side effects.
